name: Sesame Chicken Salad
recipeIngredient: 1/4 lb fresh snow peas (trimmed and cut into julienne strips)
1 medium cucumber (peeled, seeded, and cut into 1-1/2 x 1/4-inch strips)
1 medium red pepper (cut into 1-1/2 x 1/4-inch strips)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all salad ingredients in a large bowl and stir well.
Serve at room temperature or slightly chilled.
2. For the sesame dressing, combine chicken broth, peanut oil, rice or white wine vinegar, soy sauce, and sesame oil in a jar. Securely cover with a lid and shake vigorously until emulsified. Use about 3/4 cup for serving.
Each serving provides:
261 calories
18.8 g protein
5.2 g fat
33.5 g carbohydrate
1.6 g dietary fiber
877 mg sodium
40 mg cholesterol
Optional ingredients are not included in the nutritional analysis.
